task_completion.description: Log in to the NOSH ChartingSystem as the root admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The login screen shows the username 'admin' being entered, or the main dashboard is visible indicating the active user is the administrator.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management or administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays an administration panel, settings menu, or a list of system users.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the user 'Dr. James Carter' (demo_provider) for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form, modal, or detailed view is open specifically for 'Dr. James Carter' or the username 'demo_provider'.

task_completion.description: Change the user's role to Administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or selection field for the user's role/group shows 'Administrator' or 'admin' selected instead of 'Provider'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to finalize the promotion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'User updated successfully') is visible, or the user list reflects 'Dr. James Carter' (demo_provider) with the new role of 'Administrator' or 'admin'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to change the user role.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database client tools (like MySQL CLI) are visible executing UPDATE commands on the users table.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a local or expected URL for the NOSH system, and the interface matches a genuine web application rather than a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user to be promoted is 'Dr. James Carter' (username: demo_provider). The user's initial role is 'Provider' (group ID 2) and must be changed to 'Administrator' or 'admin' (group ID 1). The root admin username is 'admin'.
